name: Divyansh
summary: A 2025 CS Grad with a filmmaker's eye for UX. Building full-stack systems where high-fidelity design meets agentic automation.

bullets: Developed comprehensive React components using modern functional component patterns and React Hooks.
Integrated robust REST APIs with Next.js, significantly improving data load times by 20%.
Configured tailored Tailwind CSS utility classes to match the design system efficiently.
Refactored legacy JavaScript code to strong TypeScript, reducing standard run-time errors.
Implemented basic web accessibility standards across multiple forms.
Built responsive user interfaces utilizing responsive web design CSS principles.
Engineered scalable backend service integrations utilizing robust Node.js and Express server routing.
Optimized query performance in PostgreSQL to retrieve massive internal datasets efficiently.
Integrated secure user authentication using modern standards.
